brief_notes: Excellent coverage of all major findings from extraction with accurate reproduction of PCC values (0.804/0.798 ResNet, 0.793/0.796 SWIN, 0.757/0.713 LSTM), p-values, hemisphere results, and loss weights. One minor hallucination: speech parameter PCC values (f0=0.907, f2=0.895, etc.) not found in extraction. Strong structure with 4 figures and 4 tables; well-organized sections covering architecture comparison, hemisphere analysis, electrode density, and cortical contribution.
